files.content: --- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"div"> {} const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"
import ChevronDownIcon from "lucide-static/icons/chevron-down.svg"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

import navigationMenuTriggerStyle from "./navigation-menu-trigger-style"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"button">

const { class: className, type = "button", ...props } = Astro.props
---

<button
  data-slot="navigation-menu-trigger"
  type={type}
  class={cn(navigationMenuTriggerStyle(), "group", className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
  {" "}
  <ChevronDownIcon
    class="relative top-px ml-1 size-3 transition duration-300 group-data-open/navigation-menu-trigger:rotate-180 group-data-popup-open/navigation-menu-trigger:rotate-180"
    aria-hidden="true"
  />
</button>

export { default as NavigationMenu } from "./navigation-menu.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuContent } from "./navigation-menu-content.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuIndicator } from "./navigation-menu-indicator.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuItem } from "./navigation-menu-item.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuLink } from "./navigation-menu-link.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuList } from "./navigation-menu-list.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuPositioner } from "./navigation-menu-positioner.astro"
export { default as NavigationMenuTrigger } from "./navigation-menu-trigger.astro"
export { default as navigationMenuTriggerStyle } from "./navigation-menu-trigger-style"
